step1.title: Browse Equipment
step1.description: Search and filter from hundreds of verified heavy equipment listings across Ethiopia.

step2.title: Book & Confirm
step2.description: Request a booking with your preferred dates. Owner confirms within 24 hours.

testimonials.title: What Our
testimonials.description: Real stories from satisfied customers across Ethiopia

verifiedOwners.title: Verified Owners
verifiedOwners.description: All equipment owners are ID-verified and their listings are inspected before approval.

fastBooking.title: Fast Booking
fastBooking.description: Book in minutes. Get confirmation within 24 hours. No endless back-and-forth.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Our team is always available to help resolve any issues during your rental.

securePayments.title: Secure Payments
securePayments.description: Your payments are protected. We hold deposits until the job is done right.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to Get Started?
ctaBanner.description: Join hundreds of businesses and equipment owners already using Concrete Ethiopia.

hero.description: Concrete Ethiopia is the country's leading digital marketplace for heavy equipment rental. We bridge the gap between equipment owners and businesses that need reliable machinery — making construction projects faster, safer, and more affordable.

mission.title: Making Equipment Accessible to Every Ethiopian Business
mission.paragraph1: We started Concrete because we saw a clear problem: Ethiopian construction companies were losing time and money trying to find reliable equipment through informal networks and word-of-mouth.
mission.paragraph2: Our platform creates a transparent, trusted marketplace where equipment owners can list their assets and earn income, while businesses can quickly find exactly what they need — with verified quality, clear pricing, and professional service.
mission.paragraph3: Today we operate across 15+ cities in Ethiopia, with a growing network of verified owners and thousands of successful rentals completed.

trustAndSafety.title: Trust & Safety
trustAndSafety.description: Every owner and listing is verified. Your security is our top priority.

communityFirst.title: Community First
communityFirst.description: We empower Ethiopian businesses and equipment owners to grow together.

fastAndReliable.title: Fast & Reliable
fastAndReliable.description: Quick bookings, real-time availability, and dependable support.

qualityAssurance.title: Quality Assurance
qualityAssurance.description: All equipment is inspected and meets our strict quality standards.

team.title: Built for Ethiopia, by Ethiopians
team.description: Our team is passionate about Ethiopia's economic growth and the role construction plays in building the country's future. We're committed to creating technology that works for real people, in real conditions, across Ethiopia.

header.title: Get In Touch
header.description: Have a question, need support, or want to partner with us? We'd love to hear from you.
